description: Use this API to read power flow change data into the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = rdch(numnam, ifile)

parameters.name: numnam
parameters.description: Flag for bus number or name specification on records. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: ifile
parameters.description: Name of power flow data file, options. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
